zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Reade I於1409年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Reed27歲，母親Elizabeth Winter38歲。他於大約1432年與Lady Johanne Carrant在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年在他的家鄉享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Reade I于1409年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Reed27岁，母亲Elizabeth Winter38岁。他于大约1432年与Lady Johanne Carrant在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1435年在他的家乡享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Reade I was born in 1409, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Richard Reed, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Winter, was 38. He married Lady Johanne Carrant about 1432, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1435, in his hometown, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Reade I est né en 1409, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Reed, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Winter, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Lady Johanne Carrant environ 1432, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1435, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Reade I 1409 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Reed 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Winter 38. Er hat um 1432 in Gloucestershire, England Lady Johanne Carrant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 26 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Reade I è nato il nel 1409 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Reed, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Winter, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Lady Johanne Carrant circa 1432, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1435, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Reade Iが1409年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Reedは27歳，母Elizabeth Winterは38歳であった。約1432年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでLady Johanne Carrantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年に故郷で26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Reade I(이)가 1409년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Reed(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Winter(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1432년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Lady Johanne Carrant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 그의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Reade I nasceu em 1409, em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Reed, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Winter, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Johanne Carrant aproximadamente 1432, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1435, em sua cidade natal, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Reade I родился в 1409 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Reed было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Winter, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Johanne Carrant около 1432 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1435 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Reade I nació en 1409, en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Reed, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Winter, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Lady Johanne Carrant aproximadamente 1432, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1435, en su pueblo, a la edad de 26 años.
